TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_M’ihu, title = M’ihu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/M’ihu} }

S.FORM: alang M'ihu ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 208 buwan, 526 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 413 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 69%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 2%, saySiyat 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na M'ihu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na M'ihu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na M'ihu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na M'ihu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na M'ihu hya' ga Kling. tay mkyahu' na M'ihu hya' ga S'yux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang M'ihu ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 208 buwan, 526 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 79% kyan ku 413 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 21% kyan ku 113 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 69%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 2%, saySiyat 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na M'ihu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na M'ihu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na M'ihu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na M'ihu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na M'ihu hya' ga Kling. tay mkyahu' na M'ihu hya' ga S'yux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mʔiħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mʔiħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mʔiħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mʔiħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mʔiħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mʔiħu ħjaʔ ɣa kliŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mʔiħu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕʔjux. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
